title: Elizabeth Blackwell: America's First Woman Doctor
titleZh: 伊丽莎白·布莱克威尔：美国第一位女医生

q.en: In what year did Elizabeth Blackwell become the first woman to attend medical college in the United States?
q.zh: 伊丽莎白·布莱克威尔是在哪一年成为美国首位进入医学院就读的女性？

options.en: 1857 according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 1857年（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book states the year was 1847, when Elizabeth was the first woman ever to attend medical college.
explain.zh: 书中说那一年是1847年，伊丽莎白成为首位进入医学院就读的女性。

q.en: Where and when was Elizabeth Blackwell born?
q.zh: 伊丽莎白·布莱克威尔出生在哪里、哪一年？

options.en: In the United States, in 1847
options.zh: 出生于美国，1847年

options.en: In France, in 1838
options.zh: 出生于法国，1838年

options.en: In England, in 1821
options.zh: 出生于英格兰，1821年

options.en: In Germany, in 1851
options.zh: 出生于德国，1851年

explain.en: She was born in England in 1821, the second of nine children in a close, loving family.
explain.zh: 她1821年出生于英格兰，是九个孩子中排行第二，家庭亲密和睦。

q.en: What does the word 'determined' tell us about Elizabeth in the book?
q.zh: 书中 'determined'（下定决心的）一词说明了伊丽莎白的什么特点？

options.en: She wanted to marry and stop working
options.zh: 她想结婚并停止工作

options.en: She was unsure and changed her plans often according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 她犹豫不决，经常改变计划（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: She was afraid of blood and suffering
options.zh: 她害怕血与痛苦

options.en: She had her mind made up to become a doctor and would not give up
options.zh: 她下定决心要成为医生并且绝不放弃

explain.en: The glossary defines 'determined' as having one's mind made up to do something; she was set on proving women could be doctors.
explain.zh: 词汇表把 determined 解释为下定决心做某事；她立志证明女性也能当医生。

q.en: How many medical schools rejected Elizabeth before one accepted her?
q.zh: 在有一所医学院录取她之前，伊丽莎白被多少所医学院拒绝了？

options.en: Fifty schools rejected her
options.zh: 五十所拒绝了她

options.en: Sixteen schools rejected her
options.zh: 十六所医学院拒绝了她

options.en: None rejected her
options.zh: 没有一所拒绝她

options.en: Only one school rejected her according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 只有一所拒绝了她（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book says sixteen schools rejected her before Geneva Medical College accepted her.
explain.zh: 书中说在日内瓦医学院录取她之前，有十六所医学院拒绝了她。

q.en: Why was Elizabeth actually accepted at Geneva Medical College?
q.zh: 伊丽莎白到底为什么被日内瓦医学院录取了？

options.en: The all-male students voted to admit her as a joke
options.zh: 全体男生以为是个玩笑，投票决定录取她

options.en: The king ordered the school to accept her according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 国王下令学校必须录取她（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: She paid the highest tuition
options.zh: 她交了最高的学费

options.en: She won a contest against other students
options.zh: 她在与同学的比赛中获胜

explain.en: Her acceptance was 'an accident of sorts' — professors let students vote, expecting rejection, but the students jokingly voted to admit her.
explain.zh: 她的录取'多少是个意外'——教授让学生投票，本以为会被拒，学生们却当玩笑投了赞成票。

q.en: What happened to Elizabeth in Paris that changed her life?
q.zh: 伊丽莎白在巴黎发生了什么改变她一生的事？

options.en: She married a fellow doctor
options.zh: 她与一位男医生结婚

options.en: Water from a baby's eye infection got in her eye and she lost her left eye
options.zh: 婴儿眼部感染的水溅入她眼中，导致她失去左眼

options.en: She won a prize for being the best student according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 她获得最佳学生奖（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: She became a famous surgeon
options.zh: 她成为了著名外科医生

explain.en: While caring for a baby with an eye infection, water squirted in her face; her eye became infected and had to be removed, ending her surgery hopes.
explain.zh: 照顾眼部感染婴儿时，水溅到她脸上，眼睛感染被迫摘除，使她无法再当外科医生。

q.en: In 1857, what did Dr. Blackwell establish in New York City?
q.zh: 1857年，布莱克威尔医生在纽约建立了什么？

options.en: A school for teaching music
options.zh: 一所教授音乐的学校

options.en: A small hospital for poor women and children
options.zh: 一所为贫困妇女和儿童开设的小医院

options.en: A large factory for making medicine according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一家制药大工厂（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A museum about doctors
options.zh: 一座关于医生的博物馆

explain.en: In 1857 she established a small hospital for poor women and children, run by women doctors.
explain.zh: 1857年她创办了一所由女医生运营、服务贫困妇女儿童的小医院。

q.en: Why does the author include the Seneca Falls Convention in the book?
q.zh: 作者为什么在书中提到塞内卡福尔斯会议（Seneca Falls Convention）？

options.en: To show the wider fight for women's rights happening at that time
options.zh: 为了展现当时争取女性权利的更广阔背景

options.en: To list the medical college's rules according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 为了列出医学院的规章（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: To describe a holiday celebration
options.zh: 为了描写一个节日庆典

options.en: To explain how to become a doctor
options.zh: 为了说明如何成为医生

explain.en: The author uses the 1848 Seneca Falls Convention to give context for the limited rights women faced and the fight for equality.
explain.zh: 作者用1848年的塞内卡福尔斯会议，交代当时女性权利受限、争取平等的大背景。

q.en: What role did Elizabeth's sister Emily play in the story?
q.zh: 伊丽莎白的妹妹艾米丽（Emily）在故事中扮演了什么角色？

options.en: She wrote the book about drums
options.zh: 她写了那本关于鼓的书

options.en: She was the king who started a holiday according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 她是开创某个节日的国王（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: She invented the bass drum pedal
options.zh: 她发明了低音鼓踏板

options.en: She became the second woman doctor in the United States
options.zh: 她成为了美国第二位女医生

explain.en: Emily Blackwell had recently become the second woman doctor in the United States and joined Elizabeth at the hospital.
explain.zh: 艾米丽·布莱克威尔刚成为美国第二位女医生，并来到医院协助姐姐。

q.en: When Elizabeth graduated in 1849, how did she rank in her class?
q.zh: 1849年毕业时，伊丽莎白在班上的成绩排名如何？

options.en: She finished first in her class
options.zh: 她以全班第一名的成绩毕业

options.en: She was exactly in the middle
options.zh: 她正好排在中间

options.en: She did not finish at all
options.zh: 她根本没有毕业

options.en: She finished last in her class according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 她排在全班最后（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book states she had finished first in her class and became Elizabeth Blackwell, M.D.
explain.zh: 书中说她以全班第一毕业，成为伊丽莎白·布莱克威尔医学博士。

prompt.en: Elizabeth faced rejection from sixteen schools but kept trying until she reached her goal. Think of a time you worked hard for something difficult. What helped you keep going, and what can we learn from Elizabeth's determination?
prompt.zh: 伊丽莎白被十六所学校拒绝却始终坚持，直到实现目标。想想你自己努力争取某件难事的经历：是什么帮助你坚持下去？我们能从她的决心中学到什么？

en: Describe one challenge you faced and did not give up on.
Name a quality of Elizabeth's that helped her succeed.
zh: 描述你曾经面对并坚持下来的一项挑战。
说出伊丽莎白身上帮助她成功的一个品质。
